    I

    IK_ALKOHOL - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.DeviationModule
    Deviation related to internal control for alcohol handling.
    IK_MAT - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.DeviationModule
    Deviation related to internal control for food handling.
    IN_PROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.DeviationStatus
    The deviation is currently being handled or investigated.
    INCIDENT - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLogType
    Indicates an incident related to alcohol handling or compliance.
    isAccountNonExpired() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User
    Indicates whether the user account has expired.
    isAccountNonLocked() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User
    Indicates whether the user account is locked.
    isCredentialsNonExpired() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User
    Indicates whether the user's credentials have expired.
    isEnabled() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User
    Indicates whether the user account is enabled.
    isTokenValid(String, UserDetails) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.JwtService
    Validates a JWT against the provided user details.
